students.name: Cassidy
students.studentUnderstandings: Cassidy was present in the session today. We worked on partitioning number lines and labeling fractions. Cassidy identified that the denominator represents the total parts in a whole, which is a key concept for understanding fractions.

students.name: Bristol
students.studentUnderstandings: Bristol participated in the session today. We practiced partitioning number lines into halves and skip counting by fractions. Bristol offered ideas for labeling points and worked with the group to determine numerators and denominators on the number line.

students.name: Leighton
students.studentUnderstandings: Leighton was an active participant in our session today. We worked on fractions on a number line. Leighton suggested using blocks to measure equal spaces, which was a helpful strategy for the group. Leighton05 correctly identified denominators and worked with the group on skip counting with fractions.
